question: How often does your child make eye contact when speaking with you?
How often does your child respond when their name is called?
How often does your child use gestures (pointing, waving) to communicate?
How often does your child engage in back-and-forth conversation?
How often does your child show interest in other children?
How often does your child repeat words or phrases they've heard?
How often does your child have difficulty with changes in routine?
How often does your child show unusual reactions to sounds, textures, or lights?
How often does your child engage in repetitive behaviors or movements?
How often does your child demonstrate understanding of simple instructions?
